title: scleranthus diander
intro: Scleranthus diander, also known as Chinese button flower or button flower, is a type of flowering plant native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scleranthus diander include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving menstrual cramps. Scleranthus diander can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal remedies to enhance its effects.
